intents.scenario: Verify service returns list of components when learning space has components
intents.acceptanceCriteria: Scenario 1 - Successfully listed the learning components in a learning space

intents.scenario: Verify service returns empty list when learning space has no components
intents.acceptanceCriteria: Scenario 2 - Attempted to list the learning components of a learning space that has none

intents.scenario: Verify service throws exception when learning space ID is null or empty
intents.acceptanceCriteria: Scenario 3 - Attempted to list the learning components of an invalid learning space

intents.scenario: Verify service throws exception when learning space ID is null
intents.acceptanceCriteria: Scenario 3 - Attempted to list the learning components of an invalid learning space

intents.scenario: Verify repository returns list of components for a valid learning space ID from database
intents.acceptanceCriteria: Scenario 1 - Successfully listed the learning components in a learning space

intents.scenario: Verify repository returns empty list when learning space has no components
intents.acceptanceCriteria: Scenario 2 - Attempted to list the learning components of a learning space that has none

intents.scenario: Verify repository returns empty list when learning space ID does not exist in database
intents.acceptanceCriteria: Scenario 3 - Attempted to list the learning components of an invalid learning space

intents.scenario: Verify handler returns OK response with list of components when learning space has components
intents.acceptanceCriteria: Scenario 1 - Successfully listed the learning components in a learning space

intents.scenario: Verify handler returns OK response with empty list when learning space has no components
intents.acceptanceCriteria: Scenario 2 - Attempted to list the learning components of a learning space that has none

intents.scenario: Verify handler returns BadRequest response when learning space ID is null or empty
intents.acceptanceCriteria: Scenario 3 - Attempted to list the learning components of an invalid learning space

intents.scenario: Verify handler returns NotFound response when learning space does not exist
intents.acceptanceCriteria: Scenario 3 - Attempted to list the learning components of an invalid learning space
